last_item: Band B: Layout.tsx rebuilt as a shadcn Sidebar shell (SidebarProvider/Sidebar/SidebarInset, lucide icons, active-route via data-active, top-bar page label, footer sign-out). Deleted dead Layout-only styles.css; added window.matchMedia stub to test/setup.ts for the Sidebar use-mobile hook.
last_result: green: typecheck, 93 web tests (was 88; +5 new Layout.test.tsx), build, go build. Next: band C (shared primitives) — start with ui.tsx → shadcn Button/Badge/Alert/Spinner, then Modal→Dialog, ConfirmDialog→AlertDialog, Toast→sonner.
notes: PURE UI/UX LOOP. The prior 57-iteration hardening track is COMPLETE and shipped as v0.6.0. This track rebuilds the web panel on shadcn/ui — see PROMPT.md + UI-RULES.md + backlog.md. The operator EXPLICITLY authorized the shadcn/Tailwind/Radix dependency tree, overriding the earlier rule-4/5 objection — do NOT re-litigate whether to adopt shadcn; it is required. Start at band A (scaffold), then B (shell), C (primitives), D (views one at a time), E (cleanup). Never touch Go/business logic — frontend only.
north_star: Every view in the indiepg panel rebuilt with shadcn/ui — clean, simple, consistent — with no hand-rolled component where a shadcn one exists, behavior identical, all tests green.
